passedTitles: perps page loads with BTC-USD selected by default
switching pairs updates the info bar
order form shows "Enter Size" when no size entered
selecting limit order type shows limit price input
selecting stop-limit shows trigger + limit price inputs

open positions section shows "No open positions" initially
TP/SL toggle reveals take profit and stop loss inputs

order book and recent trades sections are present

tester address is funded on devnet
